name: yak-soul-skills
author: cubxxw
description: Personal thinking frameworks and cognitive tools extracted from 13 months of structured self-observation (3580+ thinking chunks). Load individual skills or curated presets to gain access to tested methods for product building, self-modeling, meaning-making, cross-cultural analysis, and navigating life's core tensions.

skills.name: meta-soul
skills.description: Full persona loader — a systematic sensory realist thinking partner with dual rational-emotional cores

skills.name: self_modeling
skills.description: Identity as construction — treat the self as a designable, maintainable, versionable system

skills.name: lean_product
skills.description: Indie dev methodology — MVP validation, scene verification, minimum action units

skills.name: ai_native_workflow
skills.description: AI as infrastructure — agent loops, context management, MCP protocol, local-first design

skills.name: meaning_architecture
skills.description: Meaning-making through narrative, desire types, growth equations, and the creator perspective

skills.name: nomadic_cognition
skills.description: Travel and space as cognitive tools — environment-thinking mapping, emotion regulation through movement

skills.name: comparative_culture
skills.description: Civilizational analysis through infrastructure, psychological cages, and cultural dimensions

skills.name: cognitive_evolution
skills.description: Meta-method for tracking how thinking changes — paradigm shift documentation and concept networks

skills.name: authenticity_performance
skills.description: Navigate truth vs. social performance — identify which performances drain vs. sustain

skills.name: freedom_order
skills.description: Balance freedom and structure as a design problem — high autonomy, low chaos

skills.name: relationship_boundaries
skills.description: Dynamic boundary negotiation — sacrifice vs. co-creation, love vs. relationship, acceptance vs. tolerance

skills.name: systematization_experience
skills.description: Recognize when system-building becomes defense — balance logic core and sensitivity core

builder.description: For product builders and indie developers

traveler.description: For nomadic life design and cross-cultural understanding

relationship.description: For navigating intimacy, boundaries, and social dynamics

knowledge_engineer.description: For building personal knowledge systems and tracking cognitive growth
